data.body:
['Milktea Insanity' Webview Event Preview]

It seems something serious has happened to Sakurako and the Sisterhood students...
What could it be?

➡️More details: https://youtu.be/vMQChh6UpzE

#BlueArchive
![image.png](https://kivo.wiki/files/526/9tMQPxPDXHtwqUYKStJyltMNmAYMuiJP.png)

---

> 活动于 2025-04-11 16:00 追加额外内容，[推文](https://x.com/EN_BlueArchive/status/1910603737003122958)描述如下

[Webview Event 'Milktea Insanity' EP.02 Released]

Sensei, Episode 02 of the webview event story 'Milktea Insanity' is now available!
Watch the video on the official Blue Archive YouTube channel and don’t forget to claim your event rewards in-game!

➡️More details: https://youtu.be/b1yU2bb3RdY

#BlueArchive
